- **quality**: success
  - Script: `set -e
QUALITY_PATH='outputs/sdk/core/quality.md'
IMPLEMENTATION_PATH='outputs/sdk/core/implementation.md'
VERIFICATION_PATH='outputs/sdk/core/verification.md'
placeholder_hits=""
scan_placeholder() {
  surface="$1"
  if [ ! -e "$surface" ]; then
    return 0
  fi
  hits="$(rg -n -i -g '*.rs' -g 'Cargo.toml' -g '*.toml' 'TODO|stub|placeholder|future slice|not yet implemented|compile-only|for now|will implement' "$surface" || true)"
  if [ -n "$hits" ]; then
    if [ -n "$placeholder_hits" ]; then
      placeholder_hits="$(printf '%s\n%s' "$placeholder_hits" "$hits")"
    else
      placeholder_hits="$hits"
    fi
  fi
}
true
artifact_hits="$(rg -n -i 'manual proof still required|future slice|compile-only|placeholder|stub implementation|not yet fully implemented' "$IMPLEMENTATION_PATH" "$VERIFICATION_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true)"
warning_hits="$(rg -n 'warning:' "$IMPLEMENTATION_PATH" "$VERIFICATION_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true)"
manual_hits="$(rg -n -i 'manual proof still required|manual;' "$VERIFICATION_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true)"
placeholder_debt=no
warning_debt=no
artifact_mismatch_risk=no
manual_followup_required=no
[ -n "$placeholder_hits" ] && placeholder_debt=yes
[ -n "$warning_hits" ] && warning_debt=yes
[ -n "$artifact_hits" ] && artifact_mismatch_risk=yes
[ -n "$manual_hits" ] && manual_followup_required=yes
quality_ready=yes
if [ "$placeholder_debt" = yes ] || [ "$warning_debt" = yes ] || [ "$artifact_mismatch_risk" = yes ] || [ "$manual_followup_required" = yes ]; then
  quality_ready=no
fi
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$QUALITY_PATH")"
cat > "$QUALITY_PATH" <<EOF
quality_ready: $quality_ready
placeholder_debt: $placeholder_debt
warning_debt: $warning_debt
artifact_mismatch_risk: $artifact_mismatch_risk
manual_followup_required: $manual_followup_required

## Touched Surfaces
- (none declared)

## Placeholder Hits
$placeholder_hits

## Artifact Consistency Hits
$artifact_hits

## Warning Hits
$warning_hits

## Manual Followup Hits
$manual_hits
EOF
test "$quality_ready" = yes`

context_values.response.promote:
Slice 3 for `sdk:core` is implemented in [crates/myosu-sdk/src/scaffold/mod.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/crates/myosu-sdk/src/scaffold/mod.rs), [crates/myosu-sdk/src/scaffold/templates.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/crates/myosu-sdk/src/scaffold/templates.rs), and [crates/myosu-sdk/src/scaffold/tests.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/crates/myosu-sdk/src/scaffold/tests.rs), with the minimal SDK re-exports added in [crates/myosu-sdk/src/lib.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/crates/myosu-sdk/src/lib.rs) and dependency updates in [crates/myosu-sdk/Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/crates/myosu-sdk/Cargo.toml). The generator now emits a real `myosu-games-<name>` crate, uses fixed-size history storage for the `Copy` constraint, computes the SDK dependency path relative to the generated crate, supports a gated `tui` feature, and proves the generated crate both compiles and fails at the intended scaffold `todo!()` boundary.

The curated artifacts are updated in [implementation.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/outputs/sdk/core/implementation.md), [verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/outputs/sdk/core/verification.md), [quality.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/outputs/sdk/core/quality.md), and [promotion.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/outputs/sdk/core/promotion.md). `promotion.md` now marks the slice `merge_ready: yes`.

Verified with `cargo build -p myosu-sdk`, `cargo test -p myosu-sdk`, `cargo test -p myosu-sdk -- --include-ignored`, the retained Slice 2 harness filters, and the focused Slice 3 scaffold filters.

context_values.response.review:
Implemented the next approved `sdk:core` slice, Slice 2 (`AC-SDK-03`), inside the owned harness surfaces. The real compliance walk now lives in [game_valid.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/crates/myosu-sdk/src/testing/game_valid.rs:18), the convergence assertion is live in [convergence.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/crates/myosu-sdk/src/testing/convergence.rs:19), and the Slice 2 proof tests were flattened and made real in [tests.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/crates/myosu-sdk/src/testing/tests.rs:41). I also added the direct `rbp-mccfr` dependency needed for the public solver helper in [Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/crates/myosu-sdk/Cargo.toml:15), and re-exported the harness API from [mod.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/crates/myosu-sdk/src/testing/mod.rs:22).

Verification is green. With `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-sdk-target` (the default shared target dir is read-only in this sandbox), these all passed: `cargo test -p myosu-sdk testing::tests::rps_passes_all_compliance_checks`, `...broken_game_fails_zero_sum_check`, `...convergence_test_detects_non_convergence`, plus `cargo build -p myosu-sdk` and `cargo test -p myosu-sdk`. The curated lane artifacts are updated at [implementation.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/outputs/sdk/core/implementation.md:1), [verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/outputs/sdk/core/verification.md:1), [promotion.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/outputs/sdk/core/promotion.md:1), and [quality.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260319-01KM4B8FNCMBRGRWKSHK9Y8TDA/worktree/outputs/sdk/core/quality.md:1). The promotion artifact advances the lane to Slice 3, the scaffold tool.

quality.notes:
Script completed: set -e
QUALITY_PATH='outputs/sdk/core/quality.md'
IMPLEMENTATION_PATH='outputs/sdk/core/implementation.md'
VERIFICATION_PATH='outputs/sdk/core/verification.md'
placeholder_hits=""
scan_placeholder() {
  surface="$1"
  if [ ! -e "$surface" ]; then
    return 0
  fi
  hits="$(rg -n -i -g '*.rs' -g 'Cargo.toml' -g '*.toml' 'TODO|stub|placeholder|future slice|not yet implemented|compile-only|for now|will implement' "$surface" || true)"
  if [ -n "$hits" ]; then
    if [ -n "$placeholder_hits" ]; then
      placeholder_hits="$(printf '%s\n%s' "$placeholder_hits" "$hits")"
    else
      placeholder_hits="$hits"
    fi
  fi
}
true
artifact_hits="$(rg -n -i 'manual proof still required|future slice|compile-only|placeholder|stub implementation|not yet fully implemented' "$IMPLEMENTATION_PATH" "$VERIFICATION_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true)"
warning_hits="$(rg -n 'warning:' "$IMPLEMENTATION_PATH" "$VERIFICATION_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true)"
manual_hits="$(rg -n -i 'manual proof still required|manual;' "$VERIFICATION_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true)"
placeholder_debt=no
warning_debt=no
artifact_mismatch_risk=no
manual_followup_required=no
[ -n "$placeholder_hits" ] && placeholder_debt=yes
[ -n "$warning_hits" ] && warning_debt=yes
[ -n "$artifact_hits" ] && artifact_mismatch_risk=yes
[ -n "$manual_hits" ] && manual_followup_required=yes
quality_ready=yes
if [ "$placeholder_debt" = yes ] || [ "$warning_debt" = yes ] || [ "$artifact_mismatch_risk" = yes ] || [ "$manual_followup_required" = yes ]; then
  quality_ready=no
fi
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$QUALITY_PATH")"
cat > "$QUALITY_PATH" <<EOF
quality_ready: $quality_ready
placeholder_debt: $placeholder_debt
warning_debt: $warning_debt
artifact_mismatch_risk: $artifact_mismatch_risk
manual_followup_required: $manual_followup_required

## Touched Surfaces
- (none declared)

## Placeholder Hits
$placeholder_hits

## Artifact Consistency Hits
$artifact_hits

## Warning Hits
$warning_hits

## Manual Followup Hits
$manual_hits
EOF
test "$quality_ready" = yes
